name: Carrot Cake (Low Fat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Line a 13 x 9 inch baking pan with foil and coat with vegetable cooking spray.
3. In a large bowl, combine the flour, cinnamon, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and nutmeg.
4. In a separate bowl, beat together sugar, pineapple (from an 8 oz can), oil, and vanilla until smooth.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture and mix until just combined.
6. Stir in the shredded carrots.
7. Beat egg whites with a pinch of salt until stiff peaks form.
8. Fold one batch of egg whites into the carrot mixture using a rubber spatula.
9. Fold in the remaining egg whites, adding them in two more batches.
10. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
11. Bake for 40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
12. Let cool in the pan on a wire rack.
13. Invert the cake onto wax paper and remove from the pan and foil.
14. Cut into 16 pieces.
